title: Upload a supported resume and open the editor
description: This verifies that a supported resume file can be imported from the home screen and opens in the profile editor.
category: Resume Import and Saved Profile Management

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign in form
Upload a supported resume file from the home screen
Verify the profile editor opens with the imported resume parsed

title: Sign in and reach the upload screen
description: This verifies that a returning user can authenticate successfully and land on the workspace upload screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign in form
Verify the upload screen is displayed for the authenticated user

title: Sign out and end the session
description: This verifies that a signed-in user can end the session and return to the login screen.
category: Resume Import and Saved Profile Management

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign in form
Sign out of the account
Verify the login screen is displayed

title: Update the full name and keep it after reload
description: This verifies that a user can edit the full name in the profile editor, save it, and see it persist after reloading the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign in form
Open the profile editor
Edit the full name with updated content
Save the profile changes
Reload the page
Verify the updated full name is still shown in the profile

title: Create an account and enter the workspace
description: This verifies that a new user can create an account and reach the upload screen in an authenticated session.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Choose to create a new account
Fill in a new username
Fill in a new password
Submit the account creation form
Verify the upload screen is displayed for the authenticated user

title: Continue as a guest
description: This verifies that a guest user can skip authentication and reach the upload screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Choose to continue as a guest
Verify the upload screen is displayed for the guest user

title: Add a work experience entry
description: This verifies that a user can add a work experience entry with role and date details and see it appear in the experience list.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Continue as a guest user
Upload a supported resume file from the home screen
Switch to the experience section in the profile editor
Add a new work experience entry with a valid role and dates
Verify the new experience entry appears in the experience list

title: Update the professional summary and save it
description: This verifies that a user can edit the professional summary in the profile editor and see the change persist.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign in form
Open the profile editor
Edit the professional summary with updated content
Save the profile changes
Verify the updated summary is shown in the profile

title: Open a saved profile from the list
description: This verifies that a returning user can open an existing saved profile and have it load in the editor.
category: Resume Import and Saved Profile Management

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign in form
Open the saved profiles list
Choose a saved profile to open
Verify the selected profile is loaded in the editor

title: Add a new skill to the profile
description: This verifies that a user can add a skill with its supporting details and see it appear in the skills list.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Continue as a guest user
Upload a supported resume file from the home screen
Switch to the skills section in the profile editor
Add a new skill with a valid name and category
Verify the new skill appears in the skills list

title: Analyze a resume successfully
description: This test verifies that a user can run AI resume analysis and see the resulting score and recommendations.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Continue as a guest user
Upload a supported resume from the home screen
Switch to the analysis section
Start resume analysis
Verify an analysis result is displayed
Verify analysis recommendations are displayed

title: Save AI provider settings
description: Verify an authenticated user can update AI provider settings and see the changes saved successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the profile editor settings section
Fill in the API key field with a valid key value
Save the settings
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the updated AI settings remain available

title: Generate and save a cover letter
description: This test verifies that a user can enter job details, generate a cover letter, and see it saved in history.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Continue as a guest user
Upload a supported resume from the home screen
Switch to the cover letter section
Fill in a job title
Fill in a company name
Generate a cover letter
Verify a generated cover letter is displayed
Verify a saved cover letter history entry is displayed

title: Switch to Ollama settings
description: Verify an authenticated user can switch AI mode to Ollama and access the Ollama-specific configuration fields.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the profile editor settings section
Switch the AI provider mode to Ollama
Verify the Ollama configuration fields are displayed
Verify the cloud provider key field is hidden

title: Search for jobs and see matching results
description: This test verifies that a user can search jobs and see results with the expected details.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Continue as a guest user
Upload a supported resume from the home screen
Switch to the jobs section
Search for jobs
Verify job search results are displayed
Verify result details such as title, company, location, source badge, and match score are displayed

title: Filter jobs by portal
description: This test verifies that selecting a portal filter narrows the visible job results to that portal.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Continue as a guest user
Upload a supported resume from the home screen
Switch to the jobs section
Search for jobs
Select a portal filter
Verify the job results are narrowed to the selected portal

title: Export the current profile as JSON
description: Verify an authenticated user can start a JSON export from the export panel.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the export panel
Select JSON as the export format
Start the export
Verify a download is initiated
Verify the selected export format remains visible

title: Remove a skill from the profile
description: This verifies that a user can delete an existing skill and see it disappear from the skills list.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Continue as a guest user
Upload a supported resume file from the home screen
Switch to the skills section in the profile editor
Add a new skill with a valid name and category
Remove the newly added skill
Verify the skill no longer appears in the skills list

title: Remove a work experience entry
description: This verifies that a user can delete an existing work experience entry and see it disappear from the experience list.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Continue as a guest user
Upload a supported resume file from the home screen
Switch to the experience section in the profile editor
Add a new work experience entry with a valid role and dates
Remove the newly added work experience entry
Verify the experience entry no longer appears in the experience list

title: Export the current profile as PDF
description: Verify an authenticated user can start a PDF export from the export panel.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the export panel
Select PDF as the export format
Start the export
Verify a download is initiated
Verify the selected export format remains visible

title: Add a project to the profile
description: This verifies that a user can add a portfolio project and see it appear in the projects list.
category: Profile Editor: Projects, Education, and Certifications

steps.description: Navigate to /
Continue as a guest user
Upload a supported resume file from the home screen
Switch to the projects section in the profile editor
Add a new project with a valid name and description
Verify the new project appears in the projects list

title: Remove a saved profile after confirming deletion
description: This verifies that a saved profile can be deleted from the list after confirmation and no longer appears afterward.
category: Resume Import and Saved Profile Management

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign in form
Open the saved profiles list
Remove a saved profile and confirm the prompt
Verify the profile no longer appears in the saved profiles list

title: Show export error when download cannot start
description: Verify an authenticated user sees an export error state after attempting to export a profile.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the export panel
Select a file format for export
Start the export
Verify an export error message is visible
Verify no download is initiated

title: View previously generated cover letters
description: This test verifies that a user can open the cover letter history and see previously generated letters listed.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Continue as a guest user
Upload a supported resume from the home screen
Switch to the cover letter section
Open the cover letter history
Verify saved cover letter entries are displayed

title: Add an education entry to the profile
description: This verifies that a user can add an education entry and see it appear in the education list.
category: Profile Editor: Projects, Education, and Certifications

steps.description: Navigate to /
Continue as a guest user
Upload a supported resume file from the home screen
Switch to the education section in the profile editor
Add a new education entry with valid school and degree details
Verify the new education entry appears in the education list

title: View activity log entries
description: Verify an authenticated user can open the activity logs and review recent actions in a read-only list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the profile editor logs section
Verify recent activity entries are displayed
Verify each entry shows an action, detail, and timestamp

title: Add a certification to the profile
description: This verifies that a user can add a certification and see it appear in the certifications list.
category: Profile Editor: Projects, Education, and Certifications

steps.description: Navigate to /
Continue as a guest user
Upload a supported resume file from the home screen
Switch to the certifications section in the profile editor
Add a new certification with a valid name
Verify the new certification appears in the certifications list

title: Open a job listing in a new tab
description: This test verifies that choosing a job result opens the listing in a new browser tab.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Continue as a guest user
Upload a supported resume from the home screen
Switch to the jobs section
Search for jobs
Choose a job result
Verify the job listing opens in a new browser tab

title: See an AI configuration error when analysis is unavailable
description: This test verifies that attempting resume analysis without AI access shows a clear configuration error.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Continue as a guest user
Upload a supported resume from the home screen
Switch to the analysis section
Start resume analysis
Verify an AI configuration error is visible

title: Recover access successfully
description: This verifies that a user can request password recovery and see a success confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Choose to recover access
Fill in the username field with an existing account name
Submit the recovery request
Verify a password recovery success message is visible

title: Show an inline error for invalid sign in
description: This verifies that an incorrect password is rejected with an inline login error message.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with an incorrect password
Submit the sign in form
Verify an inline login error message is visible

title: View empty activity logs state
description: Verify an authenticated user sees an empty state when no activity logs are available.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the profile editor logs section
Verify an empty state message is visible
Verify no activity entries are displayed
